## Source: ghsa-malware (2482b9b8b7a4fcfc4ca22857e824220a1aa4e779360731fc0af0af870dd29ea7)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (83df3701a52a02b6ef7891d5d4151dbb02e7c649eb524a250a2992c625f82529)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'diet_earthsmoke' @ 0.3.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
